title: Why Housing Changes Everything
description: Housing isn't just a roof — it's the foundation that makes recovery, employment, safety, and stability possible. Real stories from my years working with veterans.

title: 15 Tips for Finding an Apartment with a Housing Voucher
description: Practical, actionable tips for the apartment search — from knowing your payment standard to negotiating with landlords to having a backup plan.

title: What Housing First Actually Means (And Why It Works)
description: Housing without preconditions like sobriety or employment. Why the evidence supports it, and what it looks like in practice through programs like HUD-VASH.

title: Your PHA Won't Call Back? Here's What to Do
description: When the housing authority isn't returning your calls, here's how to escalate — different contact methods, documentation, complaints, and legal aid.

title: The Benefits Cliff: What It Is and How to Plan for It
description: What happens when a raise pushes you past income thresholds for SNAP, Medicaid, or Section 8 — and how to plan ahead so you don't lose more than you gain.

title: 7 Section 8 Myths That Need to Die
description: Free housing? Tenants don't pay rent? Can't work while on Section 8? Let's put these misconceptions to rest with the actual facts.

title: What Happens After You Get Your Housing Voucher
description: You got your voucher — now what? The apartment search, inspections, landlord negotiations, and everything you need to know about actually using your voucher.

title: How to Talk to Your Landlord About Repairs Without Risking Retaliation
description: Practical strategies for getting repairs done while protecting yourself. When to call, when to write, and what to do if your landlord pushes back.

title: What to Do If Your Benefits Get Cut
description: If your SSI, SSDI, SNAP, or housing benefits were reduced or cut off, here are the steps to take right now — including how to appeal and where to get help.

title: Understanding Utility Allowances and Why They Matter
description: Utility allowances directly affect how much rent you pay on Section 8. Here's what they are, how they work, and what to do if yours doesn't match reality.

title: What to Do When a Landlord Rejects Your Voucher
description: Landlord won't accept your Section 8 voucher? Here's what you can do about it — your rights, your options, and how to keep moving forward.

title: 5 Affordable Housing Programs Most People Don't Know About
description: Section 8 isn't your only option. Here are five federal housing programs — including HUD-VASH, Section 811, SSVF, Section 202, and LIHTC — that could help you find affordable housing.

title: Section 8 Explained — What It Actually Is and How It Works
description: A clear, no-nonsense breakdown of the Housing Choice Voucher program — what it is, who qualifies, how the waiting list works, and tips from someone who's been in the trenches.

title: Welcome to Waythrough Project
description: Why I started this project, how the resource finder works, and what you'll find here — free guides, tools, templates, and state-by-state resources.
